dashboard.title: Host workspace
dashboard.noArrivals: No upcoming arrivals in the next 7 days.

bookings.title: Bookings and reservation requests
bookings.desc: Review incoming requests, track arrivals, and keep check-in / check-out work visible.
bookings.queueDesc: Approve or decline pending requests and track confirmed arrivals.

editor.desc: Same field model as host onboarding.

type.title: Property type
type.desc: Choose the option that best describes your place.

info.title: Title and description
info.desc: Keep the guest-facing story, location, and rules aligned with onboarding.

amenities.title: Amenities
amenities.desc: Select the same guest amenities used in onboarding.

photos.title: Photos
photos.desc: Keep the same photo section structure as create listing.

video.title: Video walkthrough
video.desc: Optional — upload a short walkthrough video (MP4, MOV, max 200 MB).

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.desc: Use the same weekday and weekend pricing fields.

rules.title: Booking rules
rules.desc: UI controls for instant booking, request-to-book, minimum stay, and check-in windows.

status.title: Listing status
status.desc: Control whether this property is visible to travellers.

fields.title: Title
fields.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Cozy cottage with mountain views
fields.descPlaceholder: Describe what makes your place special, or use AI generate above…
fields.houseRulesPlaceholder: Quiet hours, pet policy, visitor rules, smoking policy, and any arrival notes guests should know.
fields.instantBookingDesc: Guests can confirm immediately. Turn off to use booking requests that require host approval.

editor.clickBrowse: Click to browse or replace media
editor.videoHelper: Optional — helps guests feel confident before booking

reports.title: Reports
reports.desc: Revenue, occupancy, and guest score snapshot.
reports.dateRangeDesc: Choose a custom period and export data as CSV or print as PDF.
reports.trendDesc: Occupancy and revenue trend for the selected period.
reports.noComparison: No comparison data available for this period.
reports.noSegments: No segment data available for this period.
